paper_meta.Paper_title: J Eukaryotic Microbiology - 2008 - AKUNYILI - Ingestion without Inactivation of Bacteriophages by Tetrahymena

protocols.Paper_title: Ingestion without Inactivation of Bacteriophages by Tetrahymena
protocols.Evidence: “Starvation was induced by centrifugation... washing... and resuspension in HEPES at 30 °C”

protocols.Paper_title: Ingestion without Inactivation of Bacteriophages by Tetrahymena
protocols.Evidence: “Preparation of cell-free medium (CFM)” with cells “removed... by centrifugation” and the filtrate used immediately

protocols.Paper_title: Ingestion without Inactivation of Bacteriophages by Tetrahymena
protocols.Evidence: “Co-incubation of phages with Tetrahymena”; samples were filtered, diluted, and plated with an E. coli indicator

protocols.Paper_title: Ingestion without Inactivation of Bacteriophages by Tetrahymena
protocols.Evidence: Pulse-chase cells were “collected by centrifugation” and “washed... to remove free phages”; samples were plated for enumeration

protocols.Paper_title: Ingestion without Inactivation of Bacteriophages by Tetrahymena
protocols.Evidence: “Recovery of intracellular phages by SDS lysis”; cells were centrifuged/washed and diluted samples were plated

protocols.Paper_title: Ingestion without Inactivation of Bacteriophages by Tetrahymena
protocols.Evidence: UVC protection experiment: “All procedures were at room temperature”; samples were mixed with SDS “to lyse” cells for plaque counts

protocols.Paper_title: Ingestion without Inactivation of Bacteriophages by Tetrahymena
protocols.Evidence: UVB protection experiment was “as described above”; figure notes samples were processed as in the UVC protocol

protocols.Paper_title: Ingestion without Inactivation of Bacteriophages by Tetrahymena
protocols.Evidence: Transport-diffusion experiment: “All procedures were at room temperature”; cells were concentrated by centrifugation and samples assayed

protocols.Paper_title: Ingestion without Inactivation of Bacteriophages by Tetrahymena
protocols.Evidence: Electron microscopy prep harvested cells by centrifugation, washed them, and observed thin sections by TEM

protocols.Paper_title: Ingestion without Inactivation of Bacteriophages by Tetrahymena
